A '''Starjammer-IZX fast freight hauler''' was an exceedingly large cargo ship built by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]], with sturdy [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] hull plating. They were routinely found disembarking from various ports of call on the [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]]' moon of [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. The mechanic [[Shug Ninx]] had the chassis of an IZX docked inside of his repair shop in the [[Corellian Sector (Nar Shaddaa)/Legends|Corellian Sector]] of the planet.

{{Ship-stub}}
